prestazioni: AMG M157 5.5L V8 Biturbo (M157 DE55 AL red.) engine upgrade with Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (1.35 A/R, 76mm compressor wheels), upgraded billet compressor housings, and Weistec’s CNC-ported exhaust manifolds with Inconel 625 turbine housings for reduced backpressure and optimized spool. Includes Weistec’s 3.5" stainless steel downpipes with 200-cell catalytic converters and a custom-tuned ECU flash via HP Tuners with M157-specific calibration (targeting 750+ WHP on 93 octane, 850+ on E85).

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and preload), custom-valved for the W212’s multi-link rear and 4-link front suspension, paired with H&R 28mm front and 25mm rear sway bars (solid, non-adjustable) to eliminate body roll. Includes polyurethane subframe bushings (034 Motorsport) and spherical bearing control arm upgrades (Meyle HD) for razor-sharp turn-in response.

Brembo GT-R 6-piston front (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (355mm rotors) big brake kit with two-piece floating rotors (J-hook slotted, zinc-coated) and Ferodo DS2500 pads. Brake lines upgraded to stainless steel braided lines (Goodridge G-Stop) and fluid replaced with Motul RBF 660 for consistent pedal feel under extreme heat. Includes a custom ABS recalibration via Vediamo to optimize brake bias for the W212’s 55/45 weight distribution.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (W212-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders (30mm wider per side), rear quarter panels (50mm wider), and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for the Weistec downpipes. Includes a custom front splitter (carbon fiber, 3-piece) with adjustable dive planes and a rear wing (Rocket Bunny Type 2, 1,200mm span) mounted on carbon fiber pedestals for 150+ kg of downforce at 180 mph.

OEM+ AMG W212 facelift front bumper conversion (2013-2016) with custom LED daytime running lights (Lux H8 V4, 5,000K) and a carbon fiber hood (AMG Performance Studio, OEM part #A2127503700) featuring functional heat extractors and a gloss clear coat with a 5% metallic flake. Side skirts replaced with AMG W212 S-Model skirts (OEM part #A2127560000) and painted in Selenite Grey Metallic (DB 755) with a satin clear coat.

Forgeline GA3R 20x9.5 ET25 (front) and 20x11 ET45 (rear) wheels with a 5x112 PCD, hub-centric rings, and titanium hardware. Tires: Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (265/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear) with a custom tire shaving service (1.5mm tread depth) for maximum grip. Wheel finish: Brushed aluminum with gloss black inner barrels and custom AMG center caps (OEM part #A2124010025) in matte black with red accents.
